title: pelargonium × incanum
intro: Pelargonium × incanum, also known as Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × incanum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × incanum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
